# Dennie Ordynskyi

> Product designer with 14+ years designing and shipping clean, user-centered experiences across web, mobile and AI-powered products. Currently designing large-scale consumer experiences at DraftKings, and creator of the Numi nutrition app.

## About
- Name: Dennie Ordynskyi (Denys Ordynskyi)
- Role: Product Designer
- Location: United States · remote-friendly
- Currently: Product Designer at DraftKings; Founder & Designer of [Numi](https://getnumi.app)
- Focus: AI-powered products, intelligent UX, product strategy and discovery, mobile and web apps, design systems, rapid prototyping, human-AI interaction
- Languages: Ukrainian (native), English (professional), Russian (professional)
- Status: Open to new product design opportunities and select collaborations

## Selected work
- [Numi](https://getnumi.app): AI-powered nutrition tracker for iPhone — snap a photo to instantly log calories, macros and micronutrients, with a personalized "Metabolic Fingerprint", plus fasting, weight and hydration tracking. Dennie's own product, designed and built end-to-end.
- [Linc](https://linc.cloud): Cloud studio platform-as-a-service; founding designer who built the design system and end-to-end UX.
- [MyGoTrainer](https://imdennie.com/#work): iOS marketplace connecting clients, personal trainers and facilities; owned the full UI/UX.
- [Shipshape](https://imdennie.com/#work): Smart-home connected hardware; led product look-and-feel and packaging.
- [Chatbox](https://imdennie.com/#work): Customer messaging SaaS; where Dennie started as a product designer.
- [E-commerce work](https://imdennie.com/#work): Built retail experiences and design practices, scaling an agency into an e-commerce brand.
